description_long: This is a single cycling shoe featuring a streamlined, aerodynamic design with a predominantly muted green and beige color palette. The upper is constructed from perforated synthetic material for breathability, with reinforced mesh panels on the sides and heel for added support. The closure system includes a prominent ratcheting buckle and a secondary dial or strap for precise adjustment, both located on the top of the shoe. The heel and toe areas are reinforced with textured overlays for durability and protection. Branding elements, including the SIDI logo, are visible on the side, heel, and tongue, rendered in contrasting colors. The shoe is designed for performance cycling, with a stiff, low-profile sole optimized for efficient power transfer.
description: A high-performance cycling shoe in muted green and beige, featuring a ratcheting buckle, mesh panels, and visible SIDI branding. The shoe is reinforced at the heel and toe, with a breathable, perforated upper.
description_view_0: Side view showing the SIDI logo, ratcheting buckle, and perforated upper with mesh side panel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the closure system, including the dial and buckle, and the streamlined toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mesh heel panel and the smooth, aerodynamic profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the SIDI logo on the heel and the reinforced heel cup.
attribute_logo: SIDI logo on the side, heel, and tongue in yellow, white, and red
attribute_lacing_style: ratcheting buckle with dial and strap
